message: feat(debug): wire up --debug and add network traces

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+package cli
+
+import (
+	"io"
+	"log/slog"
+	"os"
+)
+
+// enableDebugLogging configures the global slog logger to emit debug logs to stderr.
+//
+// It is intentionally a no-op unless the user passes --debug, to avoid affecting
+// library/test consumers.
+func enableDebugLogging() {
+	enableDebugLoggingTo(os.Stderr)
+}
+
+func enableDebugLoggingTo(w io.Writer) {
+	slog.SetDefault(slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(w, &slog.HandlerOptions{Level: slog.LevelDebug})))
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+package cli
+
+import (
+	"bytes"
+	"log/slog"
+	"strings"
+	"testing"
+)
+
+func TestEnableDebugLoggingEmitsDebug(t *testing.T) {
+	prev := slog.Default()
+	t.Cleanup(func() { slog.SetDefault(prev) })
+
+	var buf bytes.Buffer
+	enableDebugLoggingTo(&buf)
+
+	slog.Debug("hello", "k", "v")
+
+	out := buf.String()
+	if !strings.Contains(out, "hello") {
+		t.Fatalf("expected debug output to contain message, got: %q", out)
+	}
+}
